question_text: A motor has an efficiency of 85%. It is powered by a 2000 J input of electrical energy. Calculate how much useful mechanical energy the motor produces and how much energy is wasted as heat.
correct_answer: Useful energy: 1700 J, Wasted energy: 300 J
explanation: Useful energy = 85% × 2000 J = 0.85 × 2000 = 1700 J. Wasted energy = 100% - 85% = 15%, so 15% × 2000 J = 300 J. The total must add up to 2000 J (1700 + 300 = 2000).
